_comment: Brand palette for Shopnoltd. Mirrors branding/shopnoapp-logo.svg and branding/colors/. Consumed by the APK overlay (res/values/colors.xml), the NSIS installer (branding.nsh), the in-app splash gradient, and the EXE installer graphics.

apk.name: Shopno Store
apk.tagline: Apps for everything you do with Shopnoltd.

exe.name: Shopno Login
exe.tagline: Sign in to every Shopnoltd service with one click.

_apkpure_swap._comment: When apply_overlay.py walks the APKPure APK, it looks for these source-color tokens and rewrites them. Keep the keys here in sync with the upstream APKPure theme if the colors ever change.
